title: PayU GPO Europe REST API - JSON Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions extracted from the PayU GPO Europe REST API OpenAPI 3.1.0 specification (version 2.1.0)

verificationTransferStatus.description:
Indicates status of the verification transfer.
* **Success** - transfer was received by PayU.
* **Failure** - PayU did not received funds
* **Matched** - transfer has been matched properly.
* **null** - did not have enough information about the transfer.

status.description:
Possible statuses:
  • POSITIVE - indicates that the seller is accepted and can process transactions with PayU.
  • NEGATIVE - indicates that the seller is rejected and can't process transactions with PayU. There is an error code always send for negative scenario.
  • REJECTED - indicates that provided data must be corrected.
  • WAITING_FOR_DATA - waiting for data is sent in the notification when the verification was initialized but the request to start verification was not yet received. Provide the necessary data and documents according to the type of submerchant and send POST request on endpoint.
  • WAITING_FOR_VERIFICATION - waiting for verification indicates that data and documents submitted to PayU will be verified by PayU or currently being verified. Wait for notification about status change.
  • CANCELED - canceled. Initiate new verification when it is necessary. Marketplace can not cancel verification intialized by PayU or after sending complete information.

content.description: Group of fields that indicate which data/document the error code applies to.

client_id.description: Merchant's POS identifier in PayU's system. Can be found in PayU's merchant panel

client_secret.description: Merchant's secret key. Can be found in PayU's merchant panel

client_id.description: Merchant's POS identifier in PayU's system. Can be found in PayU's merchant panel

client_secret.description: Merchant's secret key. Can be found in PayU's merchant panel

email.description: Customer's email address in merchant's system

ext_customer_id.description: Customer's identifier in the merchant's system

Partner.description: only usable with special Technical Partner priviliges that allow management of Firms, URLs, Shops and POSes created and managed by Partner

firm_id.description: publicFirmId created by Partner that will be managed

type.description: Type of the token. Either UID for normal transactions or PAYID for recurring payments.

bankApplicationReferences.description: Array containing objects about available installments options.

key.description: Unique key for assignment of particular banking application to a token. The value of this field is inserted in the order in payMethod.blikData.appKey field.

label.description: The value of the label for assigning a particular banking application to a token. A list of values for these fields is presented to the customer for selection when paying with the UID token.

recurring.description: Contains information about the recurring payment.

initializationDate.description: Date of the first transaction in the recurring payment cycle without the customer confirmation.

expirationDate.description: Expiration date of the PAYID token. Maximum date is 10 years from the creation date of the token. If the value is not provided, token will be valid indifinitely.

status.description: Status of the Click to Pay feature for Mastercard.

dpaId.description: Merchant ID in Mastercard Click to Pay.

status.description: Status of the Click to Pay feature for Visa.

dpaId.description: Merchant ID in Visa Click to Pay.

acquirerBIN.description: Acquirer Bank Identification Number for Click to Pay transactions.

acquirerMerchantId.description: Acquirer Merchant ID for Click to Pay transactions.

brandImageUrl.description: URL of the Click to Pay brand image.

payByLinks.description: Section containing available PayByLink payment methods

value.description: payType value. You can find available values here.

brandImageUrl.description: Link to logo graphic on PayU server.

donation.description: Section containing data of donation added to the order.

delivery.description: Section containing delivery address. For a list of parameters, see section delivery

street.description: Full street address, incl. apartment number. Section recommended for the 3DS 2 authentication.

postalCode.description: Postal code. Section recommended for the 3DS 2 authentication.

state.description: Country principal subdivision like "state" or "province". If provided, must be a valid ISO 3166-2 code (e.g. "UT" for Utah in the USA or "30" for "Wielkopolskie" in Poland). Section recommended for the 3DS 2 authentication.

countryCode.description: Two-letter country code compliant with ISO-3166. Section recommended for the 3DS 2 authentication.

extCustomerId.description: ID of the customer used in merchant system

email.description: Buyer's email address. **Required for Installments (PL), Pay Later (PL), Pay Later with Twisto (CZ), 3DS 2 authentication.**

phone.description: Buyer's telephone number. Please use +[country code] [number] format. **Required for Pay Later with Twisto (CZ), 3DS 2 authentication.**

firstName.description: Buyer's first name. </br>**Required for Pay Later with Twisto (CZ) and AFT card authorization (Account Funding Transaction)** </br></br>**In case of AFT card authorization you have to use ISO/IEC 8859-1 encoding**.

lastName.description: Buyer's last name. </br>**Required for Pay Later with Twisto (CZ) and AFT card authorization (Account Funding Transaction)**</br></br>**In case of AFT card authorization you have to use ISO/IEC 8859-1 encoding**.

language.description: Language code, ISO-639-1 compliant. Denotes the language version of PayU hosted payment page and of e-mail messages sent from PayU to the payer.

birthDate.description: Buyer's date of birth. **Required for AFT card authorization (Account Funding Transaction)**.

shippingMethods.description: Array of objects related to shipping method.

country.description: Two-letter shipping country code compliant with ISO-3166.

products.description: Section containing data of the ordered products. Section products is an array of objects of type product.

virtual.description: Product type, which can be virtual or material. **Even if sent, the virtual parameter is not returned in PAYU notifications.**

shoppingCarts.description: Array of objects related to transaction identification.

fee.description: Marketplace fee. Value should be in range <0, amount>

clickToPayVisa.title: visa
clickToPayVisa.description: Click to Pay data for Visa.

clickToPayMastercard.title: mastercard
clickToPayMastercard.description: Click to Pay data for Mastercard.

srcDigitalCardId.description: A srcDigitalCardId is a unique identifier that represents the token associated with a card enrolled in Mastercard Checkout Solutions (MCS)

clickToPay.description: ClickToPay details. When this node is used, set `type` to `PBL` and `value` to `c`. Provide exactly one option: `visa` or `mastercard` (not both).

specificData.description: Additional data for some Visa Checkout integrations.

blikData.description: Additional data for BLIK payment with T6 or token.

aliasLabelProposal.description:
Label proposal associated with given mobile application. This field can be used only during token registration.
Required for the BLIK Recurring.

registerTokenValue.description: UID/PAYID token value assigned by the merchant. This field can be used only during token registration.

register.description: Set to `true` specifies that an alias registration request will be sent. Set to false will result in payment with a T6 authorization code without token registration.

appKey.description: The identifier of the customer's chosen bank mobile application within which the transaction authorization will take place.

recommendedAuthLevel.description: The proposed level of transaction authorisation. A value of `NO_CONFIRMATION` means no need for transaction confirmation. In case of recurring payments, the value of `NO_CONFIRMATION` means that the merchant is aware of potential fraud risk, accepts it and takes full responsibility for potential fraudulent transactions.

countryCode.description: Indicates the market where the BLIK payment will be initiated. If the field is not provided, the default value will be **PL**.

recurring.description: Contains information about the recurring payment.

type.description: Type of the recurring payment. Required for the recurring payment.

initializationDate.description: Date of the first transaction in the recurring payment cycle without the customer confirmation.

expirationDate.description: Expiration date of the PAYID token. Maximum date is 10 years from the creation date of the token. If the value is not provided, token will be valid indifinitely.

authorizeDespiteRecurringNotSupported.description: Indicates if BLIK transaction should be processed even if Buyers bank do not support recurring feature in BLIK payment. In such case, only a single transaction will be processed.

threeDsData.description: Object containing result data from 3DS process.

status3Ds.description:
3DS status. Following values are allowed to be used:
  • Y - successful 3DS2 authentication,
  • A - 3DS2 authentication attempt.

status3DsDescription.description: Description related to 3DS result. Passing this parameter as a additional description with the MPI will allow better potential customer support from BOK.

xid.description:
Unique identifier of 3DS transaction given by the shop. Field required within 3DS version 1 section. This field should not be sent when attempting 3DS2.x authentication.
  • [1 .. 20] characters - for value in plain text,
  • {28} characters - for Base64encoded value,
  • {40} characters - for HEXencoded value.

dsTransactionId.description: Field required within 3DS2.x section. This field should not be sent when attempting 3DS version 1 authentication.

eciCode.description: E-commerce Indicator / UCAF. Values can be passed with "0", e.g. "04", "05", etc. It should be passed always if the MPI provided this information.

cavv.description: 3DS cryptogram. It should be passed always if the MPI provided this information.

tavv.description: Token Authentication Verification Value (TAVV) from external provider.

clickToPay.description: ClickToPay details. When this node is used, set `type` to `PBL` and `value` to `c`. Provide exactly one option: `visa` or `mastercard` (not both).

authorizationCode.description: Optional, usage differs depending on payment method. For BLIK integrated transparently: enables to collect 6-digit BLIK code on your website instead of redirecting to BLIK.

authorizationType.description: Applicable only to card-based payments, incl. Apple Pay, Google Pay.

amount.description: Additional information required for Marketplace integration - must be equal to `totalAmount` as sum of amount parameters objects in `shoppingCards` array

cardInstallments.description: For merchants operating on the Romanian market (Requires contact with a Payu representative first).

provider.description: Card installments program obtained by retrieving [Installments Options](#tag/Card-Installments/operation/retrieve-card-installments).

number.description: Selected amount of card installments, obtained by [retrieving Installments Options](#tag/Card-Installments/operation/retrieve-card-installments).

payMethods.description: Section allows to directly invoke payment method. Section payMethods is one object of payMethod type.

mcpData.description: Section allows to pass currency conversion details if you chose to use Multi-Currency Pricing.

exemption.description: Merchant's preference regarding SCA exemption to be used to exempt card payment from 3DS authentication. Exclusive with challengeRequested. Requires additional configuration to be enabled.

value.description: Either LOW_RISK (also known as TRA - transaction risk analysis compliant with SCA requirements has been performed by the merchant) or LOW_VALUE (low value payment, up to 30 EUR or equivalent in other currency)

rejectionHandling.description: Either PERFORM_AUTHENTICATION (PayU will return response with WARNING_CONTINUE_3DS and redirection URL code if exemption cannot be applied) or DECLINE (PayU will decline the payment if exemption cannot be applied - error message will be returned synchronously in OrderCreateResponse)

riskScore.description: Risk score assigned by merchant's antifraud tool. For informative purposes only.
riskScore.example: 120 - low risk score calculated in Merchants antifraud tool

browser.description: Browser data required for 3DS 2 browser flow. If not provided, these data will be collected by PayU. It is strongly recommended to include it when charging a stored card (multi-use token), because in some cases it will spare you redirection to PayU's authentication page.

acceptHeaders.description: Exact content of the HTTP accept headers as sent from the payer's browser.

requestIP.description: IP address of the browser as returned by the HTTP headers.

screenWidth.description: Total width of the payer's screen in pixels. Obtained from the screen.width HTML DOM property.

javaEnabled.description: Obtained from the navigator HTML DOM object.

timezoneOffset.description: Obtained from the getTimezoneOffset() method applied to Date object.

screenHeight.description: Obtained from the navigator HTML DOM object.

userAgent.description: Exact content of the HTTP user-agent header.
userAgent.example: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/100.0.4896.127 Safari/537.36

colorDepth.description: Obtained from payer's browser using the screen.colorDepth HTML DOM property.

language.description: Obtained from payer's browser using the navigator.language HTML DOM property. Max. 8 chars.

sdkEphemPubKey.description: Public key component of the ephemeral key pair generated by the 3DS SDK and used to establish session keys between the 3DS SDK and the issuer.

sdk.description: Required if 3DS 2 is to be natively supported in your mobile app. Content needs to be generated by a certified 3DS 2 SDK. This information is not required, but it is strongly recommended to include it when charging a stored card (multi-use token).

sdkMaxTimeout.description: Indicates the maximum amount of time (in minutes) for all exchanges. The field shall have value greater or equal to 05.

merchantFunds.description: Indicates whether merchant's own funding (e.g. a gift card) has been used to partially pay for the order. Sum of amounts provided here and of <totalAmount> field denote the real value of order in merchant's system.

merchantRiskIndicator.description: Set of fields helping to assess risk connected with the order itself (type of goods purchased, shipping method etc.).

shipIndicator.description: Indicates shipping method chosen for the order.

preOrdered.description: Indicates order for merchandise with a future availability or release date.

reordered.description: Indicates if the same purchase has been ordered again.

recurring.description: Additional information in case of a recurring payment.

frequency.description: The minimum number of days between recurring payments (e.g. setting it to 7 for a weekly cycle). However, according to the recommendations of card schemes, when dealing with recurring payments that have a variable frequency, it's advised to use a value of 1 for this parameter.

expiry.description: Date after no further recurring payments will be performed. According to recommendation by the card schemes, in cases where there is no established expiry or end date of recurring (e.g. subscriptions), the value of "9999-12-31T00:00:00Z" should be used.

createDate.description: Date when the account has been created for the cardholder.

suspiciousActivity.description: Indicates whether merchant has experienced suspicious/fraudulent activity for this account.

deliveryAddressFirstUsedDate.description: Date when the shipping address used for this order was first used.

deliveryAdressUsageIndicator.description: Indicates when this shipping address was first used.

pastOrdersYear.description: Orders created in merchant's system for this account in the past 12 months.

pastOrdersDay.description: Orders created in merchant's system for this account in the last 24 hours.

purchasesLastSixMonths.description: Fulfilled (successful) orders created in merchant's system for this account in the past 6 months.

changeDate.description: Date when account details were last changed.

changeIndicator.description: Indicates time when account information was last changed.

passwordChanged.description: Date when account password was last changed.

passwordChangeIndicator.description: Indicates whether and when the password was last changed.

nameToRecipientMatch.description: Indicates whether cardholder's name matches recipient's name.

addCardAttemptsDay.description: Indicates attempts to add a card to cardholder's account in merchant's system within last 24 hours.

authMethod.description: Authentication method used to recognize cardholder.

authDateTime.description: Date and time when authentication was performed.

cardAddedDate.description: Date when card account has been stored with merchant.

cardAddedIndicator.description: Indicates if and when the card was stored with merchant.

street.description: Full street address, incl. apartment number.

state.description: Country principal subdivision like "state" or "province". If provided, must be a two-letter country code compliant with ISO-3166.

countryCode.description: Two-letter country code compliant with ISO-3166.

cardholder.description: Describes cardholder's account data in merchant's possession, including details of account run for the cardholder in merchant's system **You have to use ISO/IEC 8859-1 encoding**.</br></br>You can use this field for providing cardholder name for AFT card authorization (Account Funding Transaction) instead of using buyer's first and last name.

threeDsAuthentication.description: Contains optional fields required by 3DS 2 authentication protocol.

challengeRequested.description: Merchant's preference regarding 3DS 2 challenge. Exclusive with exemption. Maybe overridden by PayU.

riskData.description: Contains optional fields required for risk analysis purposes. **Required for BLIK with authorization code or token.**

address.description: Section containing data about shipping address. Section <shippingMethod.address> is a single object of type address

pointId.description: The full name of the pickup point, including its unique identifier.

street.description: Street name, possibly including house and flat number.

countryCode.description: Two-letter country code compliant with ISO-3166.

shippingMethod.description: Section containing data of shipping method. Section <shippingMethod> is a single object of type shippingMethod.

shoppingCart.description: Section containing data of the ordered products. Section <credit.shoppingCarts> is an array of objects of type shoppingCart.

products.description: Section containing data of the ordered products. Section products is an array of objects of type product.

virtual.description: Product type, which can be virtual or material.

listingDate.description: Marketplace date from which the product (or offer) is available, ISO format applies.

extCustomerId.description: Submerchant identifier. This field should be consistent with field extCustomerId in shoppingCarts section when order is placed in marketplace.

credit.description: Section containing credit data. This information is not required, but it is strongly recommended to include it. Otherwise the buyer will be prompted to provide missing data on provider page when payment by Installments or Pay later.

applicant.description: Section containing data of person applying for a credit.

language.description: Language code, ISO-639-1 compliant. Denotes the language version of PayU hosted payment page and of e-mail messages sent from PayU to the payer.

address.description: Section containing data about applican's address.

street.description: Street name, possibly including house and flat number.

countryCode.description: Two-letter country code compliant with ISO-3166.

additionalInfo.description: Additional information about person applying for credit.

hasSuccessfullyFinishedOrderInShop.description: Information whether there were previous, successfully completed orders for applicant.

klarnaAttachment.description: Extra merchant data mandatory for merchants operating in certain segments. You will find more information about this object and its parameters on **[Klarna Documentation Page](https://docs.klarna.com/klarna-payments/additional-resources/use-cases/extra-merchant-data/)**.

id.description: submerchant ID when payment is created by Payment Facilitator for Submerchant

cardInstallmentsOptions.description:
List of allowed installment numbers for any number of specific providers, eg. "OPTIMO": [1, 2, 3]. For merchants operating on the Romanian market (requires contact with a Payu representative first). Available providers:
  • CARD_AVANTAJ
  • STAR_BT
  • UNICREDIT
  • BRD_INSTALLMENTS
  • RAIFFEISEN
  • GARANTI_RO
  • BCR_INSTALLMENTS
  • ALPHABANK_INSTALLMENTS
  • OPTIMO
  • CARD_EMAG

properties.description: Array of objects related to transaction identification.

name.description: Static value. The payment identifier, displayed on transaction statements as "Trans ID" and within the transaction search option in the Management Panel.

amount.description: Amount you want to capture. Must be less than captured order amount. **Can be used only during partial capture**.

currencyCode.description: Currency of the order. **Can be used only during partial capture**

paymentFlow.description: Payment flow of of payment (for card and card based instruments payments)

cardNumberMasked.description: Masked card number (real number or token - in case of Apple Pay and Google Pay Tokenized).

card3DsFrictionlessIndicator.description: Indicates whether the authentication was frictionless or with challenge

card3DsStatusDescription.example: MessageVersion=2.1.0,browser flow,3DS method not available,dynamic authentication,no cancel indicator,no status reason

cardBinCountry.description: Country in which card was issued. Two-letter country code compliant with ISO-3166

firstTransactionId.description: Identifier of the first of recurring payments or Card-on-File, granted by the payment organisation

resultCode.description:
Optional informaction about transaction result code:
  • AUT_ERROR_NO_AUTHORIZATION - authorization was not received, transaction cancelled.
  • AUT_ERROR_ANTIFRAUD_DECLINED - transaction rejected at the authoriztion stage by the antifraud system.
  • REG_ERROR_ANTIFRAUD_DECLINED - transaction rejected at registration stage by antifraud system.
  • REG_ERROR_AUTHENTICATION_REJECTED - Authentication was rejected by a third-party service.
    • For Visa Mobile payment method: Authentication failed in either the Visa Mobile or Issuer application.

number.description: Bank account number from which payment was made.

name.description: Name of the account holder from which payment was made (or full data – name, surname and address).

city.description: City included in account holder address.

postalCode.description: Postal code included in account holder address.

street.description: Street name and house number included in account holder address.

resultCode.description:
Optional informaction about transaction result code:
  • AUT_ERROR_NO_AUTHORIZATION - authorization was not received, transaction cancelled.
  • AUT_ERROR_ANTIFRAUD_DECLINED - transaction rejected at the authoriztion stage by the antifraud system.
  • REG_ERROR_ANTIFRAUD_DECLINED - transaction rejected at registration stage by antifraud system.
  • REG_ERROR_AUTHENTICATION_REJECTED - Authentication was rejected by a third-party service.
    • For Visa Mobile payment method: Authentication failed in either the Visa Mobile or Issuer application.

txRef.description: The transaction identifier assigned by the BLIK system.

validUntil.description: The expiration date and time for the transaction

currencyCode.description: ISO 4217 currency code of currency in which Shop balance is kept.

total.description: total balance of funds on Shop

available.description: value of available funds that are under Merchant disposition, excluding funds locked by PayU system

amount.description: Amount of the refund. If this is left blank, all funds will be returned to the buyer.
Amount of the refund. If this is left blank, all funds will be returned to the buyer.
Amount of the refund. If this is left blank, all funds will be returned to the buyer.

shopId.description: Public identifier for the shop within PayU, under which payout will be executed.

extPayoutId.description: External identificator of Payout assigned by Merchant. Parameter must be unique within the scope of a given shop, upon encountering an error, you should use a different value.

amount.description: amount for which Payout should be created

additionalVariables.description: Allows sending additional information to the system (Variable Symbol). Data from this field is send only to the supporting banks. This solution is dedicated only for Czech market.

extPayoutId.description: External identificator of Payout assigned by Merchant. Parameter must be unique within the scope of a given shop, upon encountering an error, you should use a different value.

amount.description: Amount for which Payout should be created.

additionalVariables.description: Allows sending additional information to the system (Variable Symbol). Data from this field is send only to the supporting banks. This solution is dedicated only for Czech market.

foreign.description: Flag indicating whether payout was made to a foreign account.

account.description: Information about account to which payout should be sent.

accountNumber.description: Bank account number. Required account formats for foreign transfers: Polish account: NRB, IBAN. Czech account: IBAN, internal in ([0-9]{1,6}[ -])?[0-9]{2,10}[ /][0-9]{4}) format. As for now, there is no format restrictions for national bank transfers.

bankName.description: Name of the bank. Required for foreign flag set to true.

swiftCode.description: Bank's SWIFT code. Required for foreign flag set to true.

countryCode.description: Payout recipient's address details. Two-letter country code compliant with ISO-3166. Required for foreign flag set to true.

city.description: Payout recipient's address details - city. Required for foreign flag set to true.

postalCode.description: Payout recipient's address details - postal code.

street.description: Payout recipient's address details - street. Required for foreign flag set to true.
Bank address information - street. Required for foreign flag set to true.

postalCode.description: Bank address information - postal code. Required for foreign flag set to true.

city.description: Bank address information - city. Required for foreign flag set to true.

countryCode.description: Bank address information. Two-letter country code compliant with ISO-3166. Required for foreign flag set to true.

shopId.description: Public identifier for the shop within PayU, under which payout will be executed.

payee.description: Required section designed to limit the risk of fraud or money laundering.

extCustomerId.description: Customer (payee) id assigned in the merchant system.

accountCreationDate.description: Date when the user was created in the merchant system.

cardForPayout.description: Data of the card that the payout will be made to. Required in case of a payout to the card number.

shopId.description: Public identifier for the shop within PayU, under which payout will be executed.

cardToken.description: Card token representing card to which payout will be made. Required in case of a payout to the card token.

shopId.description: Public identifier for the shop within PayU, under which payout will be executed.

account.description: Information about submerchant account to which payout should be sent.

extCustomerId.description: Unique submerchant identifier assigned by the Marketplace.

extPayoutId.description: External identificator of Payout assigned by Merchant. Parameter must be unique within the scope of a given shop, upon encountering an error, you should use a different value.

amount.description: Amount for which Payout should be created.

currencyCode.description: Shop currency from which the conversion will be made.

fxData.description: Section containing details of the payout conversion.

partnerId.description: Partner id for currency exchange at PayU.

currencyCode.description: Currency code after conversion. Currently supported currency codes are **PLN**, **EUR**, **CZK**.

amount.description: The amount of payout after conversion that the marketplace seller will receive.

rate.description: The rate at which the payout currency is converted.

tableId.description: The ID of the exchange rate table retrieved by the merchant from PayU, determining the basis for currency conversion during payment.

shopId.description: Public identifier for the shop within PayU, under which payout will be executed.

account.description: Information about submerchant account to which payout should be sent.

extCustomerId.description: Unique submerchant identifier assigned by the Marketplace.

extPayoutId.description: External identificator of Payout assigned by Merchant. Parameter must be unique within the scope of a given shop, upon encountering an error, you should use a different value.

amount.description: Amount for which Payout should be created.

currencyCode.description: Shop currency from which the conversion will be made.

accountNumber.description: The account to which the payout was made.

CompanyData.description: Submerchant's data (if submerchant is a company).

verificationId.description: Unique id of the verification provided by PayU.

sellerId.description: Unique id of seller (submerchant) given by marketplace side. This id must be constant for every verification concerning the same (submerchant).

gusCode.description: Code relating to the legal form. For more information see the site of the Główny Urząd Statystyczny.

registryNumber.description: Company registry number (eg REGON in Poland).

registrationDate.description: Company registration date in the registries.

street.description: Street with building and apartment number. Required for full verification.

zipcode.description: Company's address zipcode. Required for full verification.

PrivatePerson.description: Submerchant's data (if submerchant is a private person).

verificationId.description: Unique id of the verification provided by PayU.

sellerId.description: Unique id of seller (submerchant) given by marketplace side. This id must be constant for every verification concerning the same (submerchant).

taxId.description: Tax id. Should be empty for private person.
taxId.format: should be empty for private person

personalIdentificationNumber.description: National, personal identification number e.g. PESEL in Poland. Required for private persons for full verification Not required for basic data.

registryNumber.description: Company registry number (eg REGON in Poland). Should be empty for private person.

street.description: Street with building and apartment number. Required for full verification.

zipcode.description: Private person's address zipcode. Required for full verification.

bankDataId.description: Id of the bank account details assigned by marketplace.

verificationId.description: Id of verification in context of which data are provided.

accountNumberRequested.description: Bank account number declared for withdrawals by submerchant.

hasDocument.description: Flag informing that this bank account for payouts should be verified on base of bank document. **It must be set to true when the method used is "BANK_STATEMENT"**.

payoutDataVerificationType.description:
Type of verification used for the provided payout details verification. Different for each verification type:
* **LIAN_LIAN** - special type for Chinese submerchants,
* **PINGPONG** - special type for Chinese submerchants,
* **OFX** - special type for Chinese submerchants,
* **BANK_STATEMENT** - used if all data are present on the document (**`hasDocument` must be true**),
* **BANK_TRANSFER**,
* **NO_VERIFICATION_NEEDED** - used if the provided bank account number was not yet verified by 3rd party but it doesn't have to be verified at the time of providing the bank details. It is used for the occasional transaction process when the bank account number is provided at the beginning of the process.

foreign.description:
Foreign Transfer Indicator. Has to be `true` for all cross-border payouts and payouts in EUR.

**For domestic transfers set this parameter to `false`, specifically**:

- Payouts in CZK (Czech Koruna) to an account held in the Czech Republic.
- Payouts in PLN (Polish Złoty) to an account held in Poland.

verificationTransferId.description: Have to be indicated in request with declared payouts data. Payouts data need to be declared in 72 hours from above request/response.

verified.description: parameter indicating whether the bank account number was already verified e.g. by another provider. If set to **false** and the verification type is other than "NO_VERIFICATION_NEEDED" PayU must verify the bank account details.

bankDataId.description: Id of the bank account details assigned by marketplace.

verificationId.description: Id of verification in context of which data are provided.

accountNumberRequested.description: Bank account number declared for withdrawals by submerchant.

hasDocument.description: Flag informing that this bank account for payouts should be verified on base of bank document. **It must be set to true when the method used is "BANK_STATEMENT**".

swiftCode.description: Standard format of Bank Identifier Code.

bankCountry.description: Bank country. **Required for foreign bank account**.

payoutDataVerificationType.description:
Type of verification used for the provided payout details verification. Different for each verification type:
* **LIAN_LIAN** - special type for Chinese submerchants,
* **PINGPONG** - special type for Chinese submerchants,
* **OFX** - special type for Chinese submerchants,
* **BANK_STATEMENT** - used if all data are present on the document (**`hasDocument` must be true**),
* **BANK_TRANSFER**,
* **NO_VERIFICATION_NEEDED** - used if the provided bank account number was not yet verified by 3rd party but it doesn't have to be verified at the time of providing the bank details. It is used for the occasional transaction process when the bank account number is provided at the beginning of the process.

ownerName.description: Name of the account owner from bank transfer.

foreign.description:
Foreign Transfer Indicator. Has to be `true` for all cross-border payouts and payouts in EUR.

**For domestic transfers set this parameter to `false`, specifically**:

- Payouts in CZK (Czech Koruna) to an account held in the Czech Republic.
- Payouts in PLN (Polish Złoty) to an account held in Poland.

verified.description: parameter indicating whether the bank account number was already verified e.g. by another provider. If set to **false** and the verification type is other than "NO_VERIFICATION_NEEDED" PayU must verify the bank account details.

bankDataId.description: Id of the bank account details assigned by marketplace.

verificationId.description: Id of verification in context of which data are provided.

accountNumberRequested.description: Bank account number declared for withdrawals by submerchant.

hasDocument.description: Flag informing that this bank account for payouts should be verified on base of bank document. **It must be set to true when the method used is "BANK_STATEMENT**".

payoutDataVerificationType.description:
Type of verification used for the provided payout details verification. Different for each verification type:
* **LIAN_LIAN** - special type for Chinese submerchants,
* **PINGPONG** - special type for Chinese submerchants,
* **OFX** - special type for Chinese submerchants,
* **BANK_STATEMENT** - used if all data are present on the document (**`hasDocument` must be true**),
* **BANK_TRANSFER**,
* **NO_VERIFICATION_NEEDED** - used if the provided bank account number was not yet verified by 3rd party but it doesn't have to be verified at the time of providing the bank details. It is used for the occasional transaction process when the bank account number is provided at the beginning of the process.

foreign.description:
Foreign Transfer Indicator. Has to be `true` for all cross-border payouts and payouts in EUR.

**For domestic transfers set this parameter to `false`, specifically**:

- Payouts in CZK (Czech Koruna) to an account held in the Czech Republic.
- Payouts in PLN (Polish Złoty) to an account held in Poland.

verified.description: parameter indicating whether the bank account number was already verified e.g. by another provider. If set to **false** and the verification type is other than "NO_VERIFICATION_NEEDED" PayU must verify the bank account details.

payTypeCategories.description: Array of enumerated values: `Card`, `PBL`. Both can be used at the same time - minimum one is required.

externalId.description: Id assigned by the Payment Facilitator.

notifyUrl.description: Notifications regarding submerchant status change will be sent to address provided in this field.

dbaName.description: "Doing business as" name, usually simplified website address which can be recognized by customer (e.g. when displayed on card statement).

street.description: Legal address street including house/apartment number (if applicable).

countryCode.description: Legal address country code. Must be a valid ISO 3166-1 two-letter code.

websiteUrl.description: A valid URL address of merchant's website.

mcc.description: Accurate Merchant Category Code established during KYC process by the PF.

riskClass.description: Risk class assigned by Payment Facilitator (basing on requirements provided by PayU).

representatives.description: Array of either principals or enterprise owners (depends on legal form). Minimum one is required.

legalForm.description: Dictionary value - legal entity type. Check dictionaries for specific origin.

taxId.description: Tax identification (e.g. NIP in Poland) or business identification (e.g. IČ in Czechia).

agreementDate.description: Date when PF signed agreement with the submerchant (required by Visa for reporting purposes).
